message:
test: add region lifecycle reproduction test

Adds an integration test to verify that sub-regions close properly
when their spawned tasks complete:

- Creates a runtime with RuntimeBuilder::current_thread()
- Spawns a task that creates a sub-region with cx.region()
- Spawns work inside the sub-region
- Verifies the work completes AND cx.region() returns (not hangs)

This test serves as a regression check for the region state machine
driving fix. Before the fix, cx.region() could hang indefinitely
because the region state wasn't being advanced when tasks completed.

The test documents the expected behavior: when all tasks in a region
complete and there are no children or pending obligations, the region
should transition through Draining → Finalizing → Closed automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
